phase_name: Fix: numpy 2.x ABI incompatibility breaks openai-whisper transcription
goal: openai-whisper's C extensions (via numba/torch) were compiled against the NumPy 1.x ABI. NumPy 2.0 introduced breaking changes to its C ABI; loading those extensions under numpy 2.x raises an error matching 'A module that was compiled using NumPy 1.x cannot be run in NumPy 2.x'. The fix has two parts: (1) pin 'numpy<2' in the first-launch pip install so new venvs always get a compatible numpy; (2) auto-detect a broken existing venv at startup (numpy>=2 installed) and delete it so first-launch setup re-runs with the corrected pin.
root_cause: run_setup_commands() installs 'openai-whisper ollama' without a numpy version constraint. pip resolves numpy to the latest release (2.0.2 at time of writing). openai-whisper's transitive dependency numba ships pre-built wheels compiled against the numpy 1.x C API, which is binary-incompatible with numpy 2.x.

tasks.title: Pin `"numpy<2"` before `openai-whisper` in `run_setup_commands()` (`src/app.rs`)
tasks.description:
In `run_setup_commands()`, change the pip install args to add `"numpy<2"` as the first package so pip resolves a 1.x numpy before pulling in openai-whisper and its transitive deps.

Current:
```rust
.args(["install", "--quiet", "openai-whisper", "ollama"])
```

Replace with:
```rust
.args(["install", "--quiet", "numpy<2", "openai-whisper", "ollama"])
```

This is a one-arg change. No other logic is altered.
checks: Run `cargo build` exit 0; `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` clean.
Call `run_setup_commands()` (e.g. via a fresh launch without venv): confirm the installed numpy version is 1.x via `~/.config/yaptap/.venv/bin/pip show numpy | grep Version`.

tasks.title: Add `fn venv_numpy_ok() -> bool` to `src/app.rs`
checks: Run `cargo build` exit 0; `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` clean.

tasks.title: Delete broken venv and trigger re-setup when `venv_numpy_ok()` returns false (`src/app.rs`)
checks: Run `cargo build` exit 0; `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` clean.
With numpy 2.x venv present: launch the app — venv is deleted and 'Setting up YapTap' alert appears; after setup completes, `pip show numpy` reports version 1.x.
With numpy 1.x venv present: launch the app — setup alert does NOT appear; startup proceeds directly to tray icon.
With no venv: setup alert appears as before.

tasks.title: Verify `cargo build`, `cargo clippy -- -D warnings`, and `cargo test` pass clean
tasks.description: After P10-T001 through P10-T003, confirm no regressions.

tasks.title: End-to-end: delete venv, relaunch dev binary, confirm transcription succeeds
tasks.description:
Verify the full repair and transcription pipeline.

1. `rm -rf ~/.config/yaptap/.venv`
2. Launch `./target/debug/yaptap` — 'Setting up YapTap…' alert appears.
3. After alert dismisses: `~/.config/yaptap/.venv/bin/pip show numpy | grep Version` → should show `1.x`.
4. Press hotkey, speak for 3 seconds, release — transcript appears on clipboard, no 'transcription failed' alert.
checks: `pip show numpy` in the venv shows Version: 1.x
Transcription succeeds — clipboard receives non-empty text.
No 'transcription failed — A module compiled using NumPy 1.x' alert.
